---
title: "Sidney Katherine Wickham"
---

## Sidney Katherine Wickham

**Dates:** (1848/9-1928)

**Maiden name:** (Kerr)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Gordon Bolles Wickham, daughter of Admiral Lord Frederic Kerr

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 25 [1897?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
